title: Don't miss the fun of the Garden Route Family Expo
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Garden Route Family...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Garden Route Family Expo is on at Bartelsfontein Farm outside Mossel Bay.

Today's entertainment wound down at 21:00, but the expo is on again tomorrow.

This evening, expo goers enjoyed dancing to the sounds of the Klipwerf Orkes in a tent and the band will be there tomorrow night again.

See a video here:https://www.facebook.com/reel/1150042113104712

Sixth year

This is the sixth year of the expo (formerly known as the 4x4 Outdoor Expo). The expo continues until Sunday.

Activities for children

There is more entertainment for children than ever before. Check out the special Kids' Zone at the expo.

Route 327

The expo address is: Route R327 Bartelsfontein, Mossel BayGPS coordinates: 34°08'53.5"S 21°57'50.8"E

Tickets are available daily at the gate. For ticket prices, see the expo Facebook site: Garden Route Family Expo. See also: www.gardenroutefamilyexpo.co.za.Transport

Golf carts are available for convenient transportation within the expo grounds. Staff are ready to help, so everyone can enjoy the expo without any hassle.

Expo hours

Sat, 27 April: 09:00 - 22:00Sun, 28 April: 09:00-13:00

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
